PreToolUse.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env*|*node_modules/*|*.git/*|*playbook-components-build/*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit this file directly' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

Stop.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npm run validate-design-system 2>&1 | tail -20; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Design system validation failed. Fix the violations above before finishing."}'; fi; exit 0
